clients.title: Clients import / export
clients.help: Download a CSV template, fill it in your spreadsheet, then import it to create multiple clients at once. The export pulls the tenant's complete list.

addresses.title: Addresses import / export
addresses.help: The addresses CSV references clients by email (column Client email). Make sure clients already exist before importing addresses.

buttons.templateTooltip: Download an empty CSV file with the right columns
buttons.exportTooltip: Export all current data as CSV
buttons.importTooltip: Upload a CSV to create multiple entries at once

resultFix: No row was created — fix the file and try again.
